title: PlayerStats-ActionBar
description: A comprehensive yet lightweight Minecraft player statistics plugin that efficiently tracks player achievements, displays real-time stats via action bar, features an intuitive GUI system, and includes leaderboards. Built with asynchronous data
body:
**PlayerStats - Advanced Player Statistics System**

PlayerStats is a comprehensive yet lightweight Minecraft plugin designed to track, display, and enhance player statistics on your server. Whether you're running a PvP-focused server or want to reward active players, PlayerStats provides the tools you need to create an engaging player experience.

![Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Version-1.0.0-blue)
![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21-green)

**Key Features**

**Real-Time Statistics Tracking**
- PvP Statistics (kills, deaths, K/D ratio)
- Mining Activity
- Playtime Monitoring
- Custom Statistics Support
- Configurable Action Bar Display

**Interactive GUI System**
- Clean and User-Friendly Interface
- Personal Statistics Overview
- Global Leaderboards
- Achievement Progress Tracking
- Customizable Menu Layouts

**Achievement System**
- Customizable Milestones
- Combat Achievements
- Mining Achievements
- Playtime Rewards
- Achievement Notifications

**Leaderboard System**
- Multiple Category Rankings
- Real-Time Updates
- Top Player Display
- Configurable Update Intervals
- Easy-to-Read Format

**Economy Integration**
- Vault Support for Rewards
- Achievement Bonuses
- Customizable Reward Values
- Balance Display Integration

**Data Management**
- Efficient Data Storage
- Automatic Data Saving
- Async Operations
- Performance-Optimized
- Data Backup Support

**Technical Features**
- Minimal Server Impact
- Asynchronous Data Handling
- Smart Caching System
- Configurable Save Intervals
- Clean API for Developers

**Commands**
- `/pstats stats [player]` - View player statistics
- `/pstats top <statistic>` - View leaderboards
- `/pstats gui` - Open statistics GUI
- `/pstats toggle actionbar` - Toggle action bar display
- `/pstats compare <player1> <player2>` - Compare player stats
- `/pstats reload` - Reload configuration (Admin/OP)
- `/pstats reset <player>` - Reset player statistics (Admin/OP)
  
Perfect for servers looking to enhance player engagement through statistics tracking and achievement systems while maintaining optimal performance. PlayerStats seamlessly integrates with your existing server setup and provides a rich set of features that can be customized to match your server's unique needs.

💝 Support Development
If you find this plugin useful, consider:

1. Follow us in Modrinth
2. Rating the plugin
3. Sharing with other server owners

For support:
- Join our Discord community - [https://discord.gg/NJVHMSMR6m](https://discord.gg/NJVHMSMR6m)

Made with ❤️ for the Minecraft community
